environment_gates.label: GitHub
environment_gates.publication_role: Code, documentation, Actions, issues, and lightweight release assets.
environment_gates.viewer_or_access_gate: Repository remains public, release v0.1.0 remains stable, and release/docs retain sibling corpus links.

environment_gates.label: Hugging Face
environment_gates.publication_role: Canonical normalized document-level Parquet dataset host.
environment_gates.viewer_or_access_gate: Dataset remains public and ungated, card keeps configs/default train path, and datasets-server viewer health is checked before release claims.

environment_gates.label: Zenodo
environment_gates.publication_role: Immutable citable archive and DOI-bearing snapshot.
environment_gates.viewer_or_access_gate: Canonical DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20595194 remains stable and any metadata update preserves related identifiers and rights caveats.

environment_gates.label: OSF
environment_gates.publication_role: Optional future mirror or review-bundle host only after a dedicated policy.
environment_gates.viewer_or_access_gate: No public OSF mirror is claimed until file-size, splitting, checksum, citation, and update cadence policy exists.

environment_gates.label: Future metadata environments
environment_gates.publication_role: Croissant, RO-Crate, Frictionless, DCAT, PROV-O, and other machine-actionable metadata exports.
environment_gates.viewer_or_access_gate: No external metadata publication is claimed until generated packages validate and point back to GitHub, Hugging Face, and Zenodo authorities.

required_terms: Existing published URLs must remain stable

doi_update_rules: Dataset card DOI, CITATION.cff, RELEASE_NOTES.md, and public release manifests must continue to point to 10.5281/zenodo.20595194 unless a separate migration track approves a replacement.
Superseded review records must remain discoverable as history, not promoted as current canonical publication surfaces.
Sibling-corpus labels may be added to docs and metadata, but existing public Hansard URLs and DOI records must not be renamed in place.
